text: After disqualifying a person, the department shall update its records to reflect that action.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.083 — Update of Records

After disqualifying a person, the department shall update its records to reflect that action.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: After disqualifying a person, the department shall update its records to reflect that action.
